axes.title: Bug reality
axes.high: Observed behavior, expected behavior, minimal repro, version/commit, and real cost are all present.
axes.medium: The draft has a real symptom but misses one or two proof elements.
axes.low: The draft reads like speculation or feature desire without a reproducible bug.

axes.title: Duplicate search
axes.high: The draft records a targeted `gh issue list` duplicate search and states no visible duplicate.
axes.medium: Duplicate search is mentioned but lacks command/search terms or result.

axes.title: Source trace
axes.high: The draft cites concrete upstream file:line locations and version/commit context.
axes.medium: Some source citations exist but do not fully trace the failing contract.

axes.title: Signal, not prescription
axes.high: The draft describes the contract gap and expected behavior without telling Jeff how to implement it.
axes.medium: The draft includes useful prior art or sketch language but clearly marks it non-prescriptive.
axes.low: The draft prescribes implementation, patch shape, migration code, or asks Jeff to adopt our design.

axes.title: Tone match
axes.high: Direct, evidence-led, concise, and Joshua-flavored without robotic hedging or generic praise.
axes.medium: Mostly direct, but has mild hedging, excess preamble, or weak tracking continuity.
axes.low: Robotic, apologetic, vague, inflated, or missing tracking continuity.

axes.title: Jeff thank-test hostile check
axes.high: No generic thanks, no vendor/customer framing, no sarcasm at Jeff, no demands, and no hostile wording.
axes.medium: Harmless but noisy thanks or soft pressure appears once.
axes.low: Hostile, entitled, deadline-pressure, or generic praise/noise dominates.

axes.title: No derail
axes.high: No secrets, no PR/patch submission, no broad feature request, explicit out-of-scope boundaries, and flywheel tracking bead present.
axes.medium: Boundaries are present but one derail risk remains.
axes.low: The draft risks derailing Jeff's workflow with secrets, PR language, broad features, or no tracking.
